overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a steady walk through a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The scene features reflective wet pavement, crowds of pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements, neon-lit modern architecture, and a prominent green-accented building. The camera moves smoothly through the plaza approaching a black metal gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with reflective pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza among crowds of pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and green shirt walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive green horizontal accents and glass facade
wet reflective pavement mirroring the sky and neon lights
tall black metal gate structure with vertical bars marking an entrance
rectangular concrete planter with dense green shrubbery
glowing purple neon sign on distant building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban plaza at dusk, with the camera walking forward through moderate crowds. A large green-accented building dominates the right side while a black metal gate looms in the distance on the left. The wet pavement reflects the ambient neon lighting, and a pedestrian with distinctive blue hair passes close by.

events.description: passing alongside the black metal gate structure on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza as the crowd density remains steady, approaching the gate structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking across the frame

entered.detail: vibrant pink neon sign on the green building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward, approaching the black metal gate on the left. The reflective plaza floor remains prominent, and new pink neon signage becomes visible on the right. The crowd continues to move in scattered patterns as the camera passes the gate structure.

agents.ego_description: walking past the gate area with pedestrians continuing to move through the plaza

segments.scene_description: Having passed the black metal gate, the camera continues through the open plaza. The green building remains a constant presence on the right while the concrete planter recedes into the distance. The reflective pavement and scattered pedestrian traffic continue as the walk progresses deeper into the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a neon-lit urban plaza at dusk, transitioning from a crowded open space toward the deeper reaches of a commercial district. It begins by walking past a large green-accented building and a pedestrian with blue hair, with the wet pavement reflecting the ambient city lights. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts toward a looming black metal gate on the left while pink neon signage emerges on the right. The scene then opens further as the camera passes through the gate structure, leaving a concrete planter behind. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the plaza, maintaining a steady path past scattered pedestrians with the green building remaining a constant presence on the right.
